overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in Western attire walking through a Mediterranean estate with a large stone villa, cypress trees, and a central courtyard fountain, transitioning from bright outdoor sunlight into a dark interior entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path along Mediterranean villa wall with cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the stone villa wall, rifle slung on back

entered.detail: large peach-colored stucco building with stone foundations and arched windows
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the path
low stone retaining wall along the left side of the path
old wooden cart with spoked wheels parked near the villa
unpaved earth trail with patches of dry grass
distant rocky mountains visible beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt path beside a large Mediterranean villa. Tall cypress trees line the left side while a stone wall borders the path. A wooden wagon sits parked near the villa's exterior wall as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with central tiered fountain and vineyard views

events.description: emerges from narrow path into open courtyard with central stone fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard approaching the central fountain, surveying the villa grounds

entered.detail: large circular multi-tiered stone fountain with wide basin
green terraced hills with cultivated rows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious courtyard centered around a large tiered stone fountain. The character walks around the fountain while the Mediterranean villa now faces the camera directly. Terraced vineyards and hills are visible in the background beyond the cypress trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone entrance porch leading to dark interior archway

events.description: enters shaded stone archway, lighting drops significantly from bright sun to deep shadow
approaches large wooden door at the end of the dark stone corridor

agents.ego_description: ascending stone stairs and entering the dark villa entrance, moving from bright exterior to shadowed interior

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with thick walls leading into darkness
wide stone steps with worn surfaces leading up to the entrance
black iron railings along the sides of the stone stairs
heavy dark wooden double doors at the end of the entrance tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone stairs into a shaded archway entrance, transitioning from bright sunlight to deep shadow. The heavy wooden door of the villa looms ahead at the end of the stone corridor, while the courtyard and fountain fall behind. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character enters the building's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched Mediterranean estate into the dim, shadowed interior of a stone villa. It begins with a character walking along a bright dirt path bordered by a stone wall and tall cypress trees, passing a wooden wagon parked against the villa's exterior. As the path opens up, the scene expands into a spacious courtyard where the camera circles a large tiered stone fountain with terraced vineyards and rolling hills visible in the distance. The movement then shifts toward the villa's facade, ascending stone stairs and passing through a shaded archway. Finally, the lighting transitions dramatically from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow as the character moves down a stone corridor toward a heavy wooden door.
